recommendations: Implement data masking for personal identifiers
Establish role-based access controls for HR data
Review and validate access control configurations
Restrict access and enable comprehensive audit logging
result.description: Visitors Logbook. A paper-based visitor logbook where individuals manually write their name, reason for visit, time in/out, and provide a signature. Multiple entries are visible.
keyFindings: Manual entry system, dependent on handwriting.
Prone to errors, illegible writing, and falsification.
No automatic time tracking—relies on honesty and accuracy of the visitor.
Contains 2 sensitive data elements requiring protection
Found 1 phone numbers needing privacy protection
Contains access control system documentation requiring security review
May include authentication mechanisms or security procedures requiring protection
